attributes.description: Kubernetes overview with resource counts. Start here to navigate your Kubernetes resources.

embeddableConfig.description: Navigation links to other K8s dashboards.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.cluster.name)
  | EVAL total_clusters = CASE(count > 0, TO_STRING(count), "No data")

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.cluster.name)
  | EVAL total_clusters = CASE(count > 0, TO_STRING(count), "No data")

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.cluster.name)
  | EVAL total_clusters = CASE(count > 0, TO_STRING(count), "No data")

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS
      total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name),
      ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE
        k8s.node.condition_ready > 0
        BY k8s.cluster.name
  | STATS healthy_count = COUNT() WHERE ready_nodes == total_nodes

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS
      total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name),
      ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE
        k8s.node.condition_ready > 0
        BY k8s.cluster.name
  | STATS healthy_count = COUNT() WHERE ready_nodes == total_nodes

embeddableConfig.description: Clusters where all nodes are ready. Healthy = every node has condition_ready > 0.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS
      total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name),
      ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE
        k8s.node.condition_ready > 0
        BY k8s.cluster.name
  | STATS healthy_count = COUNT() WHERE ready_nodes == total_nodes

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS
      total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name),
      ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE
        k8s.node.condition_ready > 0
        BY k8s.cluster.name
  | STATS unhealthy_count = COUNT() WHERE ready_nodes < total_nodes

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS
      total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name),
      ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE
        k8s.node.condition_ready > 0
        BY k8s.cluster.name
  | STATS unhealthy_count = COUNT() WHERE ready_nodes < total_nodes

embeddableConfig.description: Clusters with at least one not-ready node. Uses k8s.node.condition_ready to classify health.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
  | WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  | STATS
      total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name),
      ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE
        k8s.node.condition_ready > 0
        BY k8s.cluster.name
  | STATS unhealthy_count = COUNT() WHERE ready_nodes < total_nodes

| STATS healthy_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| STATS ns_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.namespace.name)

| STATS ns_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.namespace.name)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| STATS ns_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.namespace.name)

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.statefulset.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.statefulset.name)
| STATS statefulset_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.statefulset.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.statefulset.name)
| STATS statefulset_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.statefulset.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.statefulset.name)
| STATS statefulset_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.replicaset.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.replicaset.name)
| STATS replicaset_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.replicaset.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.replicaset.name)
| STATS replicaset_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.replicaset.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.replicaset.name)
| STATS replicaset_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.daemonset.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.daemonset.name)
| STATS daemonset_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.daemonset.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.daemonset.name)
| STATS daemonset_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.daemonset.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.daemonset.name)
| STATS daemonset_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.job.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.job.name)
| STATS job_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.job.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.job.name)
| STATS job_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.job.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.job.name)
| STATS job_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=concat(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.deployment.name)
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=concat(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.deployment.name)
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=concat(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.deployment.name)
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
| STATS pod_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel* 
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)

| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
| STATS pod_count=COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL

| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name, ":", k8s.container.name)
| STATS container_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name, ":", k8s.container.name)
| STATS container_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name, ":", k8s.container.name)
| STATS container_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
| STATS running_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 2

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
| STATS running_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 2

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
| STATS running_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 2

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
| STATS pending_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 1

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
| STATS pending_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 1

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
| STATS pending_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 1

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
| STATS failed_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 4

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
| STATS failed_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 4

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| EVAL key=CONCAT(k8s.namespace.name, ":", k8s.pod.name)
| STATS failed_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(key) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 4
